response.justification: Bogdan is a strong Staff-level polyglot engineer with highly relevant, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. He possesses deep expertise in high-throughput distributed systems (handling millions of requests per second) and strong TypeScript skills. While he lacks the required Python expertise, his proven adaptability across diverse languages and direct experience with agentic workflows make him an exceptional candidate for this AI-driven environment.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows.
Proven capability in designing high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Extensive Staff-level experience driving technical strategy and software craftsmanship.
concerns: Lacks the 'must-have' strong Python experience specifically requested in the job description.
Frequent job transitions (many roles lasting 1-2 years) might pose a risk for long-term strategic ownership.
Backend expertise leans heavily towards Node.js and DLang, rather than standard Python-based AI ecosystems.
